name: ptxiagram
description: Generate native, editable PowerPoint (PPTX) architecture, workflow, and sequence diagrams from a small JSON file — real shapes and connectors, not an embedded image. Ships with a Claude Skill (SKILL.md) and a CLI.

scripts.test: node test/render-workflow.test.mjs && node test/render-architecture.test.mjs && node test/render-sequence.test.mjs && node test/validate.test.mjs && node test/workflow-lib-smoke.test.mjs

author: hiio420official
